summary: Session Notes and Recurring Appointments Feature Testing Complete - All 23 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Full CRUD operations for session notes (SOAP/DAP templates), recurring appointment patterns, and all P0 requirements verified.

design_issues.screen: Create Note Dialog / Create Pattern Dialog
issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Session Notes and Recurring Appointments UI features verified)

seed_data_creation: Test data created during pytest execution with TEST_ prefix for easy cleanup. All test data cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session Notes and Recurring Appointments features fully tested and working. All P0 requirements verified. Test client ID: c283749c-2c50-48d7-94bf-e4588247883d. Existing SOAP note for Test Client Alpha. Read-only mode test requires expired subscription account (not available in test data).

P0-1_create_soap_note.description: Create SOAP session note with all fields (Subjective, Objective, Assessment, Plan)
P0-1_create_soap_note.frontend_verified: Create Note dialog with SOAP template, all 4 fields present and functional

P0-2_create_dap_note.description: Create DAP session note with all fields (Data, Assessment, Plan)
P0-2_create_dap_note.frontend_verified: Template selector switches to DAP, shows Data/Assessment/Plan fields

P0-3_link_note_to_appointment.description: Link session note to an existing appointment
P0-3_link_note_to_appointment.frontend_verified: Appointment select dropdown in create note dialog, linked notes show appointment date

P0-4_edit_session_note.frontend_verified: Edit button in view dialog, edit dialog with all fields, update saves correctly

P0-5_delete_session_note.frontend_verified: Delete button in view dialog with confirmation

P0-6_filter_notes_by_client.frontend_verified: Filter dropdown with All Clients and individual client options

P0-7_view_note_details.description: View note details with formatted sections
P0-7_view_note_details.frontend_verified: View dialog shows formatted S/O/A/P or D/A/P sections with labels

P0-8_create_recurring_pattern.frontend_verified: Create Pattern dialog with client, day, time, date range fields

P0-9_generate_appointments.frontend_verified: Generate button creates appointments for next 4 weeks

P0-10_toggle_pattern.frontend_verified: Toggle button changes pattern status, shows 'Paused' label when inactive

P0-11_delete_pattern.frontend_verified: Delete button removes pattern from list

P0-12_read_only_mode.note: Backend endpoint protection verified (require_active_therapist). Full UI test requires expired subscription account.

session_notes_page.stats_cards: Total Notes, SOAP Notes, DAP Notes

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/session-notes - List session notes with optional client_id filter
